phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto d'ingresso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah ee bee-LYET-toh ding-GRES-soh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si sale sul tetto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see SAH-leh sool TET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: There is an internal elevator, on the left.

responses.english: There is an internal elevator, on the left.
